blended.narrative: Saddleback Maine is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 19°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
